title: Settings
saveError: We couldn't save that setting. We've re-synced with the server — please try again.

preferences.label: Who you're looking for
preferences.hint: This is how we know who to show you in the feed.
preferences.ageNote: FLIRT is an 18+ app, so the minimum age can't go below {{min}}.

deletion.bannerBody: Your account will be permanently deleted on {{date}}. You can cancel until then.
deletion.confirmBody: Are you sure? Your account and data will be permanently deleted after the grace period.
deletion.errorBody: The request didn't reach the server. Your account is unchanged — please try again.
deletion.cancelErrorBody: Your account deletion is still scheduled. Please try again.

openError.title: Something went wrong
openError.body: We couldn't open the page. Please try again.
